name: China Energy Development Holdings Limited
summary: China Energy Development Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration, development, production, and distribution of natural gas. It operates through three segments: Exploration, Production, and Distribution of Natural Gas; Sales of Food and Beverages Business; and Money Lending Business. The company drills, explores for, develops, exploits, and produces oil and/or natural gas from site located in North Kashi Block, Tarim Basin, Xinjiang; and distributes natural gas through pipelines in the People's Republic of China. It is also involved in the sale of food and beverages; provision of loans to third parties; and operation of a chain of Chinese restaurants in Hong Kong. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
